posts.author: Jane Doe
posts.text: We open-sourced our infra tooling. Self-hosting beats SaaS lock-in for SMEs. #DevOps #SelfHosting

comments.author: Alex Smith
comments.headline: Platform Engineer at Acme
comments.text: Great move — staff augmentation + infra automation is exactly what small teams need. #DevOps

comments.author: Marie R
comments.headline: Fractional CTO
comments.text: Couldn't agree more — a senior architect on tap is the unlock.
